whatsapp.label: Chat with us
whatsapp.message: Hi TriPyramids, I'd like to know more about your trips.

footer.blurb: Curated Pharaonic journeys across the land of the Nile — from the Giza plateau to the temples of the south, guided by people who love this country.
footer.madeWith: Crafted for travelers who want more than a photo.

hero.titleLine2: are waiting for your first step.
hero.sceneLabel: An animated scene of the three Giza pyramids rising tier by tier

trips.sectionSubtitle: Hand-built itineraries across Egypt — pyramids, temples, deserts and the Nile.
trips.emptyTitle: New journeys are on the way
trips.empty: We're preparing the next set of hand-built itineraries. Tell us where you'd like to explore and we'll craft something for you.

detail.noReviews: No reviews yet for this journey. Be the first to share your experience.

reviews.sectionSubtitle: Real words from travelers who explored Egypt with us.
reviews.empty: Approved traveler reviews will appear here. Be the first to share your journey with us.

form.title: Share your experience
form.subtitle: Your review is read by our team before it appears on the site.
form.name: Your name
form.commentPlaceholder: Tell other travelers about your journey…
form.success: Thank you! Your review is awaiting approval and will appear once our team has reviewed it.
form.errorValidation: Please add your name, a rating and a comment.
form.errorRate: You've submitted a few reviews recently. Please try again a little later.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.title: Admin access
login.subtitle: Enter the shared admin password to continue.

reviews.title: Reviews moderation
